channel.title: Radiochimica Acta
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Radiochimica Acta

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Neutron capture cross section measurement for the 139La(n,γ)140La reaction at 0.0372 eV
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0302

item.title: Proton and alpha-particle activation studies of natFe, natCu, natTi and natW targets at low energies
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0310

item.title: Conversion and characterizations of polypropylene fibers into adsorbent by irradiation, chemically grafting, and their uranium uptake
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0344

item.title: Separation of no-carrier-added Bi and stable Bi from thallium
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0325

item.title: In vivo evaluation of Cerenkov luminescence and SPECT imaging for nanoscale 177Lu-labeled metal-organic framework
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0306

item.title: Radiological hazard assessment of the soil in Daquq district, Kirkuk, Iraq
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0311

item.title: Computational study of γ-ray and fast neutron shielding efficacy of (70–x)B2O3 – 5TeO2 – 20SrO – 5ZnO – (x)Bi2O3 glass systems using Phy-X/PSD, XCOM and GEANT-4
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0316

item.title: Effect of ZnO particle size on the radiation shielding efficiency of B2O3–BaO–ZnO glass system
item.description: Article by Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, M. I. Sayyed, F.F. Alharbi, M. Elsafi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0312
